eventText:
Move any or all Companions who are not in the Fellowship.
Then, choose one non-Awakened, non-Corrupted Sovereign in the same region as a Companion, and awaken him in that region.
combatPreCondition: Play if Aragorn or an Awakened Sovereign is in the battle.
combatText:
Before rolling the dice for your Leader re-roll,
forfeit Aragorn's or the Sovereign's Leadership
to cancel the Leader re-roll of the Shadow player.
